## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content priorities and clarify production workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Top Priority: Smith Industry Pages.** Stage the first 10 pages for Madi's review by EOW to show progress on a delayed project.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**X-Zek Publishing:** Usman will self-publish 10 X-Zek articles to bypass potential delays from Laban's ticket queue.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Repetition of key points (e.g., "Why X-Zek is better") is acceptable across articles, as they serve different discovery paths.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [**Workflow Rule:** Never self-publish Smith Industry or City pages; stage them in the CMS for Madi's mandatory review.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

## Topics

### Smith Industry Pages

  - [**Goal:** Stage 10 industry pages for Madi's review by EOW to demonstrate progress on a delayed project.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Production Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [Adhere to "law firm quality" standards.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
      - [Avoid hard-coding prices or other dynamic data.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
    1.  [Stage articles in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
    2.  [Send all staging links to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
    3.  [Jo will send links to Madi for review.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
    4.  [Madi will publish the approved pages.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)

### X-Zek Content

  - [**Status:** 6 articles completed; 4 from last week remain.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Action:** Usman will self-publish the full batch of 10 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Bypasses Laban's ticket queue, which could cause a 1-day delay.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
  - [**Customer Feedback:** None received.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

### Content Strategy: Repetition

  - [**Question:** Is repeating key points across comparison articles acceptable?](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [**Guidance:** Yes, repetition is acceptable because articles serve different discovery paths.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Best Practice:** Paraphrase points instead of using exact copy.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)

### Dashboard Updates

  - [**X-Zek:** Updated on Thursday with articles published during Usman's absence.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [**Smith:** Status is unclear. Usman will double-check if the dashboard is current.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Usman:**](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
      - [Self-publish 10 X-Zek articles.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [Notify Jo upon completion for customer update.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)
      - [Stage Smith Industry pages in the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [Send all Smith staging links to Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
      - [Verify Smith Looker dashboard is current.](https://fathom.video/share/syzRcu9ipUUUXXBCugYzYSv6qdJ-tYdQ?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
